segments.text: OFFICER: Good morning. What can I do for you?
segments.translation: 警官：早上好。我能为你做什么？

segments.text: LOUISE: I want to report a theft.
segments.translation: 露易丝：我要举报一起偷窃案。

segments.text: I had some things stolen out of my bag yesterday.
segments.translation: 昨天我包里有些东西被偷了。

segments.text: OFFICER: I'm sorry to hear that.
segments.translation: 警官：很遗憾听到这个消息。

segments.text: Right, so I'll need to take a few details.
segments.translation: 好吧，我需要了解一些细节。

segments.text: Can I start with your name?
segments.translation: 我能先问下你的名字吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: Louise Taylor.
segments.translation: 露易丝：露易丝·泰勒。

segments.text: OFFICER: OK, thank you.And are you resident in the UK?
segments.translation: 警官：好的，谢谢。你是英国居民吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: No, I'm actually Canadian, though my mother was British.
segments.translation: 露易丝：不，我其实是加拿大人，不过我的母亲是英国人。

segments.text: OFFICER: And your date of birth?
segments.translation: 警官：那你的出生日期呢？

segments.text: LOUISE: December 14th, 1977.
OFFICER: So you're just visiting this country?
segments.translation: 警官：那你是来这个国家旅行吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: That's right. I come over most summers on business.
segments.translation: 露易丝：没错。我经常夏天过来出差。

segments.text: I'm an interior designer and I come over to buy old furniture, antiques you know.
segments.translation: 我是一个室内设计师，我来这里采购旧家具，古董。

segments.text: There are some really lovely things around here, but you need to get out to the small towns.
segments.translation: 这附近有很多可爱的事物，但我需要到小城镇去。

segments.text: I've had a really good trip this year, until this happened.
segments.translation: 我今年的旅行很愉快，直到这件事发生。

segments.text: OFFICER: OK. So you've been here quite a while?
segments.translation: 警官：我明白了。所以你在这里有一段时间了？

segments.text: LOUISE: Yes, I'm here for two months.
segments.translation: 露易丝：是的，我要在这里待2个月。

segments.text: I go back next week.
segments.translation: 我下周就回去了。

segments.text: OFFICER: So may I ask where you're staying now?
segments.translation: 警官：请问你现在住在哪儿？

segments.text: LOUISE: Well at present I've got a place at Park Apartments, that's on King Street.
segments.translation: 露易丝：现在我在国王街的公园公寓落脚。

segments.text: I was staying at the Riverside Apartments on the same street, but the apartment there was only available for six weeks so I had to find another one.
segments.translation: 之前我住在同一条街上的河岸公寓里，但是那里的公寓只有六个星期的租期，所以我只能找另一个地方。

segments.text: OFFICER: OK. And the apartment number?
segments.translation: 警官：好的。公寓号码呢？

segments.text: LOUISE: 15.
segments.translation: 露易丝：15。

segments.text: OFFICER: Right.
segments.translation: 警官：好的。

segments.text: OFFICER: Now, I need to take some details of the theft.
segments.translation: 现在，我需要了解一些这起偷窃的细节。

segments.text: So you said you had some things stolen out of your bag?
segments.translation: 你说你的包里有东西被偷了？

segments.text: LOUISE: That's right.
segments.translation: 露易丝：没错。

segments.text: OFFICER: And were you actually carrying the bag when the theft took place?
segments.translation: 警官：偷窃发生时，你确实带着你的包吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: Yes. I really can't understand it.
segments.translation: 露易丝：是的。我真的不明白。

segments.text: I had my backpack on.
segments.translation: 我背着我的背包。

segments.text: And I went into a supermarket to buy a few things and when I opened it up my wallet wasn't there.
segments.translation: 然后我去超市买了一些东西，但当我打开它的时候，我的钱包却不在了。

segments.text: OFFICER: And what did your wallet have in it?
segments.translation: 警官：你的钱包里有什么？

segments.text: LOUISE: Well, fortunately I don't keep my credit cards in that wallet - I keep them with my passport in an inside compartment in my backpack.
segments.translation: 露易丝：幸好我没有把信用卡放在钱包里——我把它们和护照放在背包里的一个夹层中。

segments.text: But there was quite a bit of cash there ... about £250 sterling, I should think.
segments.translation: 但那里有相当一部分现金……大概有250英镑，我想。

segments.text: I withdrew £300 from my account yesterday, but I did a bit of shopping, so I must have already spent about £50 of that.
segments.translation: 我昨天从我的账户里取出了300英镑，但我买了点东西，所以我应该已经花了大概50英镑。

segments.text: OFFICER: OK.
segments.translation: 警官：好的

segments.text: LOUISE: At first I thought, oh I must have left the wallet back in the apartment, but then I realised my phone had gone as well.
segments.translation: 露易丝：一开始我想，噢，我一定是把钱包忘在公寓里了，但后来我意识到我的手机也不见了。

segments.text: It was only a week old, and that's when I realised I'd been robbed.
segments.translation: 这手机才买了一周，然后我就意识到自己被偷了。

segments.text: Anyway at least they didn't take the keys to my rental car.
segments.translation: 不过至少他们没有拿走我租的车的钥匙。

segments.text: OFFICER: Yes. So you say the theft occurred yesterday?
segments.translation: 警官：是啊。你说你是昨天被偷的？

segments.text: LOUISE: Yes.
segments.translation: 露易丝：是的。

segments.text: OFFICER: So that was September the tenth.
segments.translation: 警官：所以那是9月10日。

segments.text: And do you have any idea at all of where or when the things might possibly have been stolen?
segments.translation: 你知道这些东西可能在哪里或者是什么时候被偷的吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: Well at first I couldn't believe it because the bag had been on my back ever since I left the apartment after lunch.
segments.translation: 露易丝：一开始我不敢相信，因为自从我午饭后离开公寓，我就一直背着包。

segments.text: It's just a small backpack, but I generally use it when I'm travelling because it seems safer than a handbag.
segments.translation: 这只是一个小背包，但我通常在旅行时用它，因为它看起来比手提包安全。

segments.text: Anyway, I met up with a friend, and we spent a couple of hours in the museum.
segments.translation: 我和一个朋友碰面，我们在博物馆逛了几小时。

segments.text: But I do remember that as we were leaving there, at about 4 o'clock, a group of young boys ran up to us, and they were really crowding round us, and they were asking us what time it was, then all of a sudden they ran off.
segments.translation: 但我确实记得，当我们要离开那里的时候，大约在4点钟，一群年轻的男孩跑过来，他们挤在我们周围，问我们现在几点了，接着他们突然就跑开了。

segments.text: OFFICER: Can you remember anything about them?
segments.translation: 警官：你还记得关于他们的任何特征吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: The one who did most of the talking was wearing a T-shirt with a picture of something ... let's see ... a tiger.
segments.translation: 露易丝：那个说话最多的人穿着一件印着某样东西的T恤……让我想想……一只老虎。

segments.text: OFFICER: Right. Any idea of how old he might have been?
segments.translation: 警官：好。你知道他大概多大了吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: Around twelve years old?
segments.translation: 露易丝：大约12岁？

segments.text: OFFICER: And can you remember anything else about his appearance?
segments.translation: 警官：你还能想起他的其他外貌特征吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: Not much, he was quite thin ...
segments.translation: 露易丝：记不太清了，他很瘦……

segments.text: OFFICER: Colour of hair?
segments.translation: 警官：发色呢？

segments.text: LOUISE: I do remember that - he was blond.
segments.translation: 露易丝：这我还记得，他是金发。

segments.text: All the others were dark-haired.
segments.translation: 其他人都是深色头发。

segments.text: OFFICER: And any details of the others?
segments.translation: 警官：还有关于其他人的细节吗？

segments.text: LOUISE: Not really. They came and went so quickly.
segments.translation: 露易丝：不太记得了。他们来得快去得也快。

segments.text: OFFICER: Right. So what I'm going to do now is give you a crime reference number so you can contact your insurance company.
segments.translation: 警官：好的。现在我要给你一个案件参考号，这样你就可以联系你的保险公司了。

segments.text: So this is ten digits: 87954 82361.
LOUISE: Thank you. So should I ...
segments.translation: 露易丝：谢谢。那么我应该……
